At El Bulk, we are committed to protecting your privacy. This policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your data when you visit our store or use our services.
We collect information you provide directly to us, such as your name, email address, physical address (for shipping), and phone number when you create an account or place an order.

In accordance with Colombian law, by using this platform you authorize El Bulk to process your personal data for order fulfillment, logistical coordination with third-party carriers, and business intelligence. You maintain the right to access, update, rectify, or request the deletion of your data through our secure communication channels.

If you choose to log in using Google or Facebook, we receive your basic profile information (name, email, and profile picture). We use this data only to create and manage your account. We do not post to your social profiles or share your social data with third parties.

We use essential cookies to manage your session, cart, and preferences. With your consent, we also use analytics (Google Analytics) and marketing cookies (Meta Pixel) to improve our store and offer relevant content.
Your data is used to process orders, coordinate deliveries via WhatsApp, and (if you subscribe) send you shop updates. We never sell your personal information to third parties.
You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data at any time through your profile settings or by contacting us directly.

To delete your data, you can remove 'El Bulk' from your Facebook Profile Settings under 'Apps and Websites'. Alternatively, you can request manual deletion of your account and all associated data by sending an email to admin@elbulk.com with the subject 'Data Deletion Request'.
If you have questions about this policy, please reach out to us at admin@elbulk.com or visit us at our physical location.
By accessing El Bulk, you agree to these protocols. We curate the common, the uncommon, and the essential pieces of your TCG strategy.
We provide a specialized platform for browsing, acquiring, and liquidating TCG products. Any unauthorized extraction of data or systemic abuse will result in protocol termination.

All assets are classified into NM (Near Mint), LP (Lightly Played), or MP (Moderately Played). We do not guarantee 'Gem Mint' status. Language is determined by the specific product metadata provided in the title or description.

While we maintain high-precision sensors on our inventory, synchronization errors may occur. El Bulk reserves the right to cancel any order and provide a full refund if the asset is no longer available in the vault.

All registrations are preliminary. Final confirmation and extraction coordination will be handled via secure WhatsApp link. Orders for store pickup must be retrieved within 30 days or risk protocol expiration.
Prices are denoted in COP based on current market intelligence. We reserve the right to adjust values for pending extractions if extreme market shifts are detected before confirmation.
Submissions must meet our grading standards. We do not accept assets in 'Damaged' condition for full buy-in rates. All assets are subject to physical inspection at our extraction point.
Users are responsible for the encryption and safety of their login credentials. Maintain professional conduct when interacting with El Bulk operatives during confirmation cycles.
El Bulk is not liable for data loss or physical intercept once the extraction has been handed to third-party couriers. Risk passes to the recipient upon courier verification.

EL BULK / THE CARDS THEY OVERLOOKED.
The shoebox where we keep all the good stuff. Singles, sealed product, and accessories.
The essential pieces others treat as trash. We curate the common, the uncommon, and the impossible-to-find cards that complete your strategy.

We buy bulk commons and uncommons, bulk rares, and junk rare lots. Box it up and bring it in, get cash. No appointment needed.
We buy bulk. We sell singles. We love cardboard.
Got a shoebox of old cards gathering dust? We'll take them off your hands and put cash in your pocket. No appointment needed — just walk in.
Any condition, any set. Sorted or unsorted. We take it all.
NM/LP only. Bulk rares from Standard and below.
MP-DMG rares and mythics, or commons/uncommons in poor condition.
Any condition. Foil bulk sorted separately.
Magic: The Gathering (all sets, all formats)
Tokens and emblems ($0 value but we take them)
⚠ Prices updated regularly. Large lots (1,000+ cards) may receive bonus offers. Prices are in-store cash — store credit offers up to 25% more.
Walk in with your bulk. Sorted or unsorted, boxed or bagged — doesn't matter.
We do a quick count of your cards. For large lots we may ask for a day to sort.
We give you a cash offer on the spot. No pressure to accept.
Accept and walk out with cash (or store credit for more). Simple.
